je4

Gord has created this codespace as needed an Erd student account to test Gemini extension for codespace. Likely it will not work and we won't use it. If you see a Gemini extension don't bother with it unless I've told the class it actually works. -Gord

I can try login using sign-in-with-Google but ultimately see: Hello, Joy Your current account is not eligible for Gemini Code Assist for individuals, the free version of Gemini Code Assist.

So if this is even doable will require a Google Cloud Project.

That DID seem to work I DID create a cloud project. -Gord

...however Gemini Code Assist can not see any other repos so is not good enough.

/workspaces/je2/ ...ought to be accessible for us to crib from repo to repo.

Trying: npm install -g @google/gemini-cli
